message.content:
@startuml
participant "User" as U
participant "CouponPage" as CP
participant "DB_Beanstalkd" as DB
participant "UserMail" as UM

U ->> CP : Load merchant page with cashback
CP ->> U : Return page with discounts

U ->> CP : Clicks on cashback
CP ->> U : Returns 2 tabs, on tab 1 the reflink to merchant, on tab 2 a popup with cashback formular(email)

U ->> CP : Fills email, submits form
CP ->> DB : Saves cashback request

CP ->> U : Sends new content for checkout popup, simultaneously opens reflink with uaid in a new tab(3)
CP ->> UM : Sends new email with link to cashback form

@enduml
